description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI for general build that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that builds on multiple OS environments including ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-18.04, and windows-latest for both x64 and win32 architectures. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python 3.x, configure the build environment based on the OS, build the project, run tests, package the project, and finally run Python tests and build a wheel distribution.
